Dockerfile.general_idea: Update the base Docker image from Eclipse Temurin 17 to Eclipse Temurin 21 to align with the Java 21 migration.
Dockerfile.why_exists: The application is being migrated to Java 21; using a Java 17 base image would result in a runtime environment mismatch or failure to run Java 21 compiled bytecode.

Dockerfile.general_idea: Rename the application JAR file in the Dockerfile to match the new build artifact name.
Update the entrypoint command to reference the renamed JAR file.

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose file to comply with modern Compose specification.
Update Apache License header to include year range and URL.
Enforce service startup order by waiting for database health check before starting messenger-proxy.
Optimize database health check timing for faster startup.
Add test user credentials to Synapse service environment variables.
Enforce service startup order by waiting for Synapse database health check before starting Synapse.
Optimize Synapse database health check timing for faster startup.

http/ActuatorApi.http.general_idea: Update the package name in the actuator logging endpoint from 'timref' to 'tim' to reflect a project rebranding or refactoring.

src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Update the Apache License header to include a year range and URL.
Add a configuration property for the federation list cache update interval.
Add configuration for the TIM authorization check concept for invite events.
Update the inbound proxy homeserver URL to use the Docker service name 'synapse' instead of 'host.docker.internal'.
Add a new configuration property for the federation list cache update interval.
Add new configuration block for TIM authorization check concept.
Update copyright header to include year range and company URL.
Reformat Apache License text for better readability.
src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.before: # Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License. src/main/resources/app/resources/applica.general_idea: Add update interval configuration for federation list cache.
Add authorization check configuration for invite events.
